summary: OCB TITAN ERP - Standard Toolbar Implementation Testing (Iteration 52). All 5 modules tested - toolbars present and working correctly with proper button states based on row selection. Button colors follow ERP standard: Tambah (green), Edit (purple), Hapus (red), etc.

MASTER_ITEMS_TOOLBAR.buttons_present: PASS - Item Baru, Edit Item, Duplikasi, Hapus Item, Kartu Stok, Import, Export
MASTER_ITEMS_TOOLBAR.edit_delete_disabled_no_selection: PASS - Edit/Delete disabled when no row selected
MASTER_ITEMS_TOOLBAR.edit_enabled_after_selection: PASS - Edit enabled with purple color after row selection
MASTER_ITEMS_TOOLBAR.delete_enabled_after_selection: PASS - Delete enabled with red color after row selection
MASTER_ITEMS_TOOLBAR.selection_indicator: PASS - '1 item dipilih: TOKEN PLN 15K' indicator shown

MASTER_SUPPLIERS_TOOLBAR.edit_delete_disabled_no_selection: PASS - Edit/Hapus disabled when no row selected

MASTER_CUSTOMERS_TOOLBAR.edit_delete_disabled_no_selection: PASS - Edit/Hapus disabled when no row selected

PURCHASE_ORDERS_TOOLBAR.buttons_present: PASS - Tambah PO, Edit PO, Hapus PO, Print, Approve, Terima
PURCHASE_ORDERS_TOOLBAR.edit_delete_disabled_no_selection: PASS - All selection-dependent buttons disabled when no row selected
PURCHASE_ORDERS_TOOLBAR.buttons_enabled_after_selection: PASS - All buttons enabled after row selection with correct colors: Edit (purple), Delete (red), Print (blue), Approve (cyan), Terima (teal)
PURCHASE_ORDERS_TOOLBAR.selection_indicator: PASS - '1 item dipilih: PO000022' indicator shown

SALES_LIST_TOOLBAR.buttons_present: PASS - Tambah Invoice, Edit Invoice, Hapus Invoice, Print, Retur
SALES_LIST_TOOLBAR.edit_delete_disabled_no_selection: PASS - All selection-dependent buttons disabled when no row selected
SALES_LIST_TOOLBAR.buttons_enabled_after_selection: PASS - All buttons enabled after row selection with correct colors: Edit (purple), Delete (red), Print (blue), Retur (rose)
SALES_LIST_TOOLBAR.selection_indicator: PASS - '1 item dipilih: INV-20260312-0006' indicator shown

ROW_SELECTION_BEHAVIOR.click_selects_row: PASS - Clicking row selects it and highlights with amber background
ROW_SELECTION_BEHAVIOR.radio_button_visible: PASS - Radio button in first column shows selection state
ROW_SELECTION_BEHAVIOR.click_again_deselects: PASS - Clicking same row again deselects it

COLOR_CONSISTENCY.add_green: PASS - All Add buttons use bg-green-600 (#22c55e)
COLOR_CONSISTENCY.edit_purple_when_enabled: PASS - Edit buttons use bg-purple-600 (#a855f7) when enabled
COLOR_CONSISTENCY.delete_red_when_enabled: PASS - Delete buttons use bg-red-600 (#ef4444) when enabled
COLOR_CONSISTENCY.disabled_gray: PASS - All disabled buttons use bg-gray-700/50 with text-gray-500

context_for_next_testing_agent: ERP Standard Toolbar implementation complete and verified across all 5 modules: 1) Master Items has 7 toolbar buttons (Item Baru, Edit Item, Duplikasi, Hapus Item, Kartu Stok, Import, Export), 2) Master Suppliers/Customers have 3 buttons (Tambah, Edit, Hapus), 3) Purchase Orders has 6 buttons (Tambah PO, Edit PO, Hapus PO, Print, Approve, Terima), 4) Sales List has 5 buttons (Tambah Invoice, Edit Invoice, Hapus Invoice, Print, Retur). Row selection enables/disables buttons correctly. Color scheme follows standard: green=add, purple=edit, red=delete, orange=duplicate, blue=print, cyan=approve, teal=receive, rose=return.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/master_items.png - Shows Master Items with toolbar and data table
.screenshots/master_items_selected.png - Shows toolbar buttons enabled after row selection
.screenshots/purchase_orders.png - Shows Purchase Orders with toolbar (no selection)
.screenshots/purchase_orders_selected.png - Shows all PO buttons enabled after selection
.screenshots/sales_list.png - Shows Sales List with toolbar (no selection)
.screenshots/sales_list_selected.png - Shows all Sales buttons enabled after selection
